---
title: "Feed"
listing:
  - id: "all"
    contents:
      - "blog/*.qmd"
      - "en/blog/*.qmd"
      - "zenn/*.qmd"
      - "slides/*.qmd"
    exclude:
      filename:
        - "index.qmd"
    feed: true
    fields:
      - "title"
      - "date"
      - "image"
      - "categories"
      - "description"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    type: default
share: false
---

All public writing and talks in one stream.

## Sources

- [Blog](blog/index.qmd): personal notes, diary, and technical notes.
- [Blog (EN)](en/blog/index.qmd): English articles.
- [Zenn](zenn/index.qmd): external-facing technical articles.
- [Slides](slides/index.qmd): talks and presentation material.

::: {.category-buttons}
[Blog](blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[Blog (EN)](en/blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[Zenn](zenn/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[Slides](slides/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {#all}
:::
